layers.name: Physical Layer
layers.description: Grid assets, generation fleets, storage, compute clusters, and sensor networks expose real-world operating state and dispatchable capacity into the HyperStack system.
layers.primaryRole: Provide verified physical availability, telemetry, and controllable field execution.
layers.investorValue: Establishes the hard-asset base and measurable utilization that support platform-level monetization.

layers.name: AIMEPS Layer
layers.description: AIMEPS converts raw telemetry into machine-operable forecasts, anomaly detection, and optimization signals for autonomous infrastructure decisions.
layers.primaryRole: Transform operating data into predictive guidance and optimization packets.
layers.investorValue: Improves throughput, lowers waste, and lifts asset yield through forecast-driven operating precision.

layers.name: GTL-Link Layer
layers.description: GTL-Link synchronizes energy, compute, logistics, and transaction state across distributed infrastructure with a trusted, auditable coordination mesh.
layers.primaryRole: Provide cross-domain routing, state consistency, and secure inter-layer communication.
layers.investorValue: Reduces coordination risk and enables scalable network effects across geographically distributed infrastructure.

layers.name: ASHS Layer
layers.description: ASHS acts as the operating intelligence core, applying policy, balancing, recovery logic, and supervisory control across the full HyperStack estate.
layers.primaryRole: Issue autonomous decisions, orchestrate scenarios, and execute system-wide control loops.
layers.investorValue: Compresses response time, protects margin during volatility, and increases autonomy-driven operating leverage.

layers.name: Financial Protocol Layer
layers.description: The financial protocol turns verified operating outcomes into settlements, incentives, reserve logic, and programmable financial products.
layers.primaryRole: Translate verified performance into revenue capture, settlement, and value distribution.
layers.investorValue: Converts physical and digital performance into auditable financial outcomes and investable cash-flow logic.

layers.name: EOP Platform Layer
layers.description: EOP exposes the operating system to executives, operators, and capital partners through dashboards, alerts, audit trails, and presentation-ready intelligence.
layers.primaryRole: Present outcomes, KPIs, and trust signals in a decision-ready platform layer.
layers.investorValue: Makes HyperStack understandable, reportable, and financeable at institutional decision speed.
